Services / Managed

Continuous protection,
without the overhead.

Building a 24/7 security operation in-house is expensive and difficult to scale. Our managed services deliver the coverage you need — continuous monitoring, expert-led response, and the intelligence to stay ahead of threats — without the overhead of doing it alone.

24/7
Monitoring
SOC
Coverage
MDR
Response

What we do

Managed services built
around your environment.

Managed Detection & Response (MDR)

Continuous monitoring of your environment for threats, anomalies, and indicators of compromise — with expert analysts investigating alerts and coordinating response. Coverage your team doesn't have to staff.

SIEM Management

Deployment, tuning, and ongoing management of your SIEM platform. We reduce alert fatigue, build detection content that actually fires on real threats, and make your log data actionable.

Endpoint Protection Management

Managed deployment and administration of endpoint detection and response (EDR) platforms across your fleet. Policy enforcement, exclusion management, and incident triage — handled by our team.

Threat Intelligence

Curated threat intelligence relevant to your industry, geography, and technology stack. We contextualize the threat landscape for your environment — so you're preparing for what's actually coming.

Get started

The coverage your team
needs to stay ahead.

Talk to an Expert

Canada's pure-play cybersecurity advisory firm.
